overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial district with large storage tanks, elevated pipelines, and holographic advertisements. The player character crosses streets and walks along sidewalks in a futuristic urban environment with mixed industrial and commercial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: large industrial truck passes from right to left across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the concrete overpass and crossing the marked pedestrian crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking along the distant sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shadowed canopy overhead with support pillars
large cylindrical petrochemical storage tank with yellow piping and industrial markings
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt with red curb borders

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete highway overpass in an industrial district. The camera moves forward across a marked crosswalk toward large petrochemical storage tanks visible in the distance. A large truck passes by on the right as the player character walks through the shadowed area beneath the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial intersection with petrochemical storage facility

events.description: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt crosses from right to left in front of camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the open industrial street approaching and passing through an intersection

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt crossing the street from right to left in front of the camera
black sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large elevated industrial pipeline supported by yellow truss structures running parallel to the street
tall street lamp with distinctive orange illuminated fixture

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass shadow, the scene opens into a sunlit industrial intersection dominated by large petrochemical storage tanks. The camera passes through the intersection as a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt crosses in front, and industrial pipelines on yellow supports become visible along the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial-industrial sidewalk with holographic advertising displays

events.description: turns left from asphalt street onto orange-colored concrete sidewalk
camera tilts upward to focus on large holographic billboard on building facade

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the orange sidewalk and walking toward the large holographic billboard while following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large animated digital billboard displaying a pink-haired character advertisement with Japanese text
distinctive orange-paved pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
tall building with metal scaffolding and mounting structure for the holographic display

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a distinctive orange sidewalk, transitioning from the open industrial street to a commercial-industrial corridor. A massive holographic billboard displaying a pink-haired character dominates the left side of the view. The camera tilts upward to examine the billboard as the player continues walking along the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with building ventilation steam

events.description: camera tilts up to show steam emitting from upper building ventilation system
camera tilts back down to street level and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the building architecture and steam vents, then continuing forward along the narrow corridor

entered.detail: steam or smoke emitting from upper level ventilation system of the industrial building
metal fire escape structure attached to the building facade with visible ladders and platforms

segments.scene_description: Walking between closely spaced industrial buildings, the camera tilts upward to observe steam venting from the upper levels of the structure. The holographic billboard falls behind as the camera focuses on the building's fire escapes and ventilation systems against the bright sky, then returns to street level to continue down the narrow corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass into a bright, holographic industrial corridor. It begins beneath a massive highway bridge, moving across a marked crosswalk toward distant petrochemical tanks as a large truck passes by in the gloom. As the camera exits the shadow, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt crosses the path and industrial pipelines on yellow supports line the street. The camera then turns left onto a distinctive orange sidewalk, shifting from the open road to a commercial zone dominated by a massive holographic billboard of a pink-haired character. Finally, the view tilts upward to observe steam venting from the upper levels of closely spaced buildings and fire escapes against the bright sky before returning to street level to continue down the narrow corridor.
